_publications._publicationTitle: A High-Throughput Screening Platform Identifies Novel Combination Treatments for Malignant Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors.

_contextSnippet: from the eighteen combinations that met this criterion for the MPNST-SP-01 cell line, seven included Panobinostat (histone deacetylase inhibitor) combined with compounds targeting many different targets
details: 18 combinations met DBSumNeg values lower than -7, with 7 including Panobinostat
